parsed_review.summary: CP00-622 (RP20.P05.M01.S01-S10, risk A, 10 units, P05 fixture contract draft head) passes read-only independent review. Pack binding is consistent across registry (DATA_ROOM_VDR_CORE_CP622_PACK_BINDING), manifest, review-baseline, contract projection, and the live closeout-pack-plan.json where CP00-622 is the current cursor pack (actual_first_planned_pack_id). The deliverable distribution {fixture:6, claude_review:1, implementation:3} is produced deterministically by dataRoomVdrCoreDeliverableType over the 10 P05_FIXTURE_FOUNDATION_ROWS and matches the plan/baseline and micro_title_distribution {"Contract Draft":10}; validateDataRoomVdrCoreCp622Coverage asserts covered_units=10, section_count=1, and per-type counts. The descriptor is strictly descriptor-only: the freezeCp622Result chain (cp610->...->cp622) sets every runtime/dispatch flag false, executes_p05_fixture_contract_draft_runtime and executes_fixture_manifest_runtime false, and DATA_ROOM_VDR_CORE_CP622_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION carries synthetic_only:true, uses_real_deal_data:false, and all *_runtime_opened:false. validateDataRoomVdrCoreCp622P05FixtureContractDraftDescriptor enforces 30+ no-write/no-leak/runtime guards plus the authority boundary (claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true). Tests (model.test.js) and the validate script independently deepEqual the contract projections against code and assert handoff chaining CP00-621->CP00-622->CP00-623 / next_subphase RP20.P05.M01.S11. Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic descriptor evidence packet/receipt shapes (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, descriptor_only=true); no Hermes product runtime is embedded. CP178+ review hardening is satisfied: readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1432B stdout, well-formed JSON, ok:true), prompt is 2129B<25600 with no embedded diff/source, only Read/Grep/Glob tools, and forbidden_review_evidence enumerates auth-failure/zero-byte/malformed-JSON/fenced-JSON/tool-call-shaped/missing-field rejection cases. The pending status of manifest.production_ready (false), command-evidence (status pending, commands []), adjudication, and construction-inspection is the expected pre-receipt state for which this review is the gate, not a defect. runtime_ready remains false by design (descriptor layer). No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues found; the implementation supports the descriptor-level production_ready candidate claim, with human final approval still required before any runtime opening.
